parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 8000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are GDA Command Report Builder. Generate a structured ' + $json.outputFormat.toUpperCase() + ' report.

USER REQUEST: ' + $json.prompt + '

SOURCE DOCUMENTS (from RAG):
' + $json.ragContext + '

Return structured JSON with title, subtitle, sections array (each with heading, type, content/items/rows/headers), footer. Quality: defense contractor professional level. Return ONLY valid JSON.' }] }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, fileName: $json.fileName, format: $json.format, mimeType: $json.mimeType, base64Data: $json.base64Data, title: $json.title, slideCount: $json.slideCount || null, downloadReady: true }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ namespace: 'gda-documents', topK: 20, vector: $json.data[0].embedding, includeMetadata: true }) }}
